case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS CRUSOE,PHILIP

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF FEB-16-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRUSOE,PHILIP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUSOE,PHILIP $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION DENIED, FAILURE TO APPEAR.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRUSOE,PHILIP
